name: Prairie Farms Dairy Inc.
description: Prairie Farms Dairy, Inc. emphasizes its commitment to quality milk production, which is essential for making cream cheese. The company is owned by over 600 farm families who employ advanced farming practices to ensure the highest standards in dairy production.

name: Schreiber Foods
description: The company, Schreiber, offers a variety of products including cream cheese, which they provide to retailers, restaurants, distributors, and food manufacturers worldwide. Their commitment to food safety and product quality ensures that they deliver innovative solutions that are essential to their customers' success.

name: Farmi Piimatööstus AS (Farmi Dairy Ltd)
description: Farmi Piimatööstus is a prominent Estonian dairy manufacturer that offers a wide range of products, including cream cheese. The company is known for its high-quality dairy items and holds several quality certifications, ensuring a commitment to excellence in its cream cheese production.

name: Gordon Food Service Store
description: The company offers a variety of food and beverage products, including bulk cream cheese available in a 30 lb bag from Gordon Food Service Store. Their commitment to quality and community support enhances the overall customer experience.

name: Tyras Dairy Industry S.A.
description: TYRAS S.A. specializes in a diverse range of dairy products, including their Cream Cheese at 28%. With a commitment to high quality and innovation, the company ensures exceptional taste standards in its offerings.

name: Mila Bergmilch Südtirol - Latte Montagna Alto Adige
description: Mila specializes in a wide range of high-quality dairy products, including natural cream cheese, which is highlighted as part of their commitment to delicious and nutritious options. Their focus on sustainable practices and sourcing from local family farms further enhances the quality of their cream cheese offerings.

name: Angliss Singapore Pte Ltd
description: Bidfood Singapore offers a diverse range of over 5,000 products, including cream cheese, which is part of their extensive dairy portfolio. They are a key supplier to grocery chains and provide various culinary professionals with high-quality ingredients.

name: Vermont Creamery
description: Vermont Creamery offers a rich and decadent Italian-style cream cheese made from fresh Vermont cream, highlighting their commitment to crafting extraordinary products.

name: Puratos
description: Puratos is a manufacturer that offers innovative food ingredients and solutions, including a focus on creating exciting flavors and textures for desserts like cheesecake. Their commitment to healthier and sustainable food production aligns with the qualities that make cream cheese a desirable ingredient in various culinary applications.

name: Rich Products Corporation
description: Rich Products is a manufacturer that offers a variety of dairy products, including whipped toppings and dessert mixes. They provide creative food solutions for the foodservice and retail sectors, ensuring a diverse range of options for bakeries and restaurants.
